values.value: [Auto] Severity set to MEDIUM by default (HIGH if the gap exceeds 10 minutes or if the aircraft was within 30 nm of a customer site). Confirm last known position, altitude, and heading from the case detection facts. Check ADS-B receiver coverage map for the area — coverage gaps over remote terrain are common and not necessarily indicative of an actual issue. Cross-reference any secondary feed if available (FlightAware, FlightRadar24) to confirm whether the signal loss is universal or specific to the OpenSky feed. Wait at least 5 minutes after the last reported position before treating as a sustained outage. [Auto] If the case ages past 10 minutes without a position update, severity is escalated to HIGH and an engineering Task is created.
